zh.lifeSummary: 當D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela於1186年出生在葡萄牙時，她的父親D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela27歲，母親D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva20歲。她和D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在葡萄牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela于1186年出生在葡萄牙时，她的父亲D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela27岁，母亲D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva20岁。她和D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在葡萄牙。

nameMeanings.name: Martins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Francisco, Mario, Luis, Armando, Alvaro, Ana, Marcelo, Sergio.  Portuguese Joaquim, Joao, Paulo, Agostinho, Henrique, Afonso, Batista, Ademir, Amadeu, Anabela, Caetano, Heitor.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Martim, from Latin Martinus (see Martin ).
Dutch and German: patronymic from the personal name   Martin  . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the more common Dutch and North German variant   Martens  .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

variants.name: Martinz
meanings: Germanized form of Slovenian Martinc or of its variant Martinec .

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

en.lifeSummary: When D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela was born in 1186, in Portugal, her father, D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela, was 27 and her mother, D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, was 20. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela est née en 1186, à Portugal, son père, D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela, avait 27 ans et sa mère, D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela 1186 in Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela 27 und ihre Mutter D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva 20. Sie hatte mit D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela è nata il nel 1186 nel Portogallo, sua padre, D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Portogallo.

ja.Lodares, Louzada, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーロウサダロダレス
ja.Lodares, Lousada, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーロウサダロダレス
ja.lifeSummary: D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizelaが1186年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizelaは27歳，母D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silvaは20歳であった。彼女はD. Martim Fernandes de Novaesとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去し，ポルトガルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela(이)가 1186년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 포르투갈에 묻혔다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela nasceu em 1186, em Portugal, seu pai, D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela родилась в 1186 г. в местности Португалия, её отцу по имени D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando D. Sancha Martins - de Riba de Vizela nació en 1186, en Portugal, su papá, D. Martim Fernandes - de Riba de Vizela, tenía 27 años y su mamá, D. Thereza Estevainha Soares da Silva, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con D. Martim Fernandes de Novaes. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Portugal.
